'''bosanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vulgarizing|vulgarizing]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vulgarizing|vulgarizing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bosanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bosanithi|bosanithi]] || [[word:bosaniji|bosaniji]] || [[word:bosanishi|bosanishi]] || [[word:bosaniki|bosaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bosanuthu|bosanuthu]] || [[word:bosanuju|bosanuju]] || [[word:bosanushu|bosanushu]] || [[word:bosanuku|bosanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bosanuthu|bosanuthu]] || [[word:bosanuju|bosanuju]] || [[word:bosanushu|bosanushu]] || [[word:bosanuku|bosanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bosanufthuf|bosanufthuf]] || [[word:bosanufjuf|bosanufjuf]] || [[word:bosanufshuf|bosanufshuf]] || [[word:bosanufkuf|bosanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bosanethe|bosanethe]] || [[word:bosaneje|bosaneje]] || [[word:bosaneshe|bosaneshe]] || [[word:bosaneke|bosaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bosanotho|bosanotho]] || [[word:bosanojo|bosanojo]] || [[word:bosanosho|bosanosho]] || [[word:bosanoko|bosanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bosanotho|bosanotho]] || [[word:bosanojo|bosanojo]] || [[word:bosanosho|bosanosho]] || [[word:bosanoko|bosanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bosanofthof|bosanofthof]] || [[word:bosanofjof|bosanofjof]] || [[word:bosanofshof|bosanofshof]] || [[word:bosanofkof|bosanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfthĂŻf|bosanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfjĂŻf|bosanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfshĂŻf|bosanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfkĂŻf|bosanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfthĂŻf|bosanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfjĂŻf|bosanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfshĂŻf|bosanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfkĂŻf|bosanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfthĂŻf|bosanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfjĂŻf|bosanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfshĂŻf|bosanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfkĂŻf|bosanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfthĂŻf|bosanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfjĂŻf|bosanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfshĂŻf|bosanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bosanĂŻfkĂŻf|bosanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bosanĂŠthĂŠ|bosanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bosanĂŠjĂŠ|bosanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bosanĂŠshĂŠ|bosanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bosanĂŠkĂŠ|bosanĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bosanatha|bosanatha]] || [[word:bosanaja|bosanaja]] || [[word:bosanasha|bosanasha]] || [[word:bosanaka|bosanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bosanatha|bosanatha]] || [[word:bosanaja|bosanaja]] || [[word:bosanasha|bosanasha]] || [[word:bosanaka|bosanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bosanafthaf|bosanafthaf]] || [[word:bosanafjaf|bosanafjaf]] || [[word:bosanafshaf|bosanafshaf]] || [[word:bosanafkaf|bosanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bosanasha|bosanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bosanshĂ«asha|bosanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bosanroasha|bosanroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bosanmuasha|bosanmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bosanyaasha|bosanyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobosannkshĂ«asha|gobosannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobosannkroasha|gobosannkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobosannkmuasha|gobosannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobosannkyaasha|gobosannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bosasanasha|bosasanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bosasanshĂ«asha|bosasanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bosasanroasha|bosasanroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bosasanmuasha|bosasanmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bosasanyaasha|bosasanyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobosasannkshĂ«asha|gobosasannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobosasannkroasha|gobosasannkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobosasannkmuasha|gobosasannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobosasannkyaasha|gobosasannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:besĂŠnasha|besĂŠnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:besĂŠnshĂ«asha|besĂŠnshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:besĂŠnroasha|besĂŠnroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:besĂŠnmuasha|besĂŠnmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:besĂŠnyaasha|besĂŠnyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobesĂŠnnkshĂ«asha|gobesĂŠnnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobesĂŠnnkroasha|gobesĂŠnnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobesĂŠnnkmuasha|gobesĂŠnnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobesĂŠnnkyaasha|gobesĂŠnnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bosfanasha|bosfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bosfanshĂ«asha|bosfanshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bosfanroasha|bosfanroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bosfanmuasha|bosfanmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bosfanyaasha|bosfanyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobosfannkshĂ«asha|gobosfannkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobosfannkroasha|gobosfannkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobosfannkmuasha|gobosfannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobosfannkyaasha|gobosfannkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
